case_title: SHARON MOWERY VS. FOGO DE CHAO, INC, ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-19-2020 CONTINUED TO SEP-30-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-10-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOWERY, SHARON AS TO DEFENDANT FOGO DE CHAO, INC, DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR AUG-19-2020 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-15-2020 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUL-27-2020

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-10-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE SEP-30-2020 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 200016611)
